subject: The /myfi:taxes command pipeline's end-to-end output for one client's tax year — the filing-actionable summary produced AFTER the pipeline clears the @auditor compliance gate, distinct from a bare TAXES-skill answer to a single question (see taxes_knowledge.rubric.json). This rubric judges the full pipeline run, gate included.

dimensions.desc: Walks the full pipeline end to end — gather, classify, route to forms, compute an estimate, name an optimization move, flag the filing deadline — not one isolated step passed off as the whole answer.

Reflects that the @auditor compliance gate actually ran before the summary shipped: out-of-scope items are routed to a human rather than guessed, every numeric claim and form citation reads as checked, and the professional-review caveat is present, not merely tax-mechanically correct in isolation.

guidance: Reward a complete, gate-cleared pipeline output a preparer could act on immediately: real forms, a real estimate, a real deadline, and visible evidence the compliance pass ran (scope flags, professional-review caveat). Penalize a single-step answer standing in for the whole pipeline, an invented numeric threshold, a missing filing deadline, or no trace that a compliance/adversarial pass ever happened.
